headline: Luca Stephenson
body: Luca Stephenson has completed his move from Liverpool to Championship outfit Bolton Wanderers. £700,000 deal and Liverpool have negotiated a 20% sell-on clause.
raw_text:
Luca Stephenson has completed his move from Liverpool to Championship outfit Bolton Wanderers. 
£700,000 deal and Liverpool have negotiated a 20% sell-on clause.
text:
